statement.p: A small town would like to replace its aging water treatment system. This will cost {\$15{,}300{,}000}\text{,} but the town just needs {\$1{,}530{,}000} up front for downpayment on a loan that will cover the rest. The town treasury has {\$765{,}000} in it already for this need, and the town can gather {\$190{,}000} per month from taxes. How long will it take to reach enough for downpayment on that loan?
